addresses_denial_rationale.description: Engages and rebuts each specific denial reason stated in the denial letter.

rebuts_specific_flaw.description: Factually rebuts every distinct denial hook with case-specific facts in the letter.

cites_clinical_evidence.description: Cites concrete patient-specific clinical facts in the appeal letter — not promises to attach records later.

medical_director_persuasion.description: Clinical argument would convince a skeptical medical director to overturn based on the letter alone.

cites_applicable_authority.description: When authority is cited: real, fairly represented, and applicable. No citation invoked = neutral (anchor 5).

cites_binding_policy.description: When policy/regulation is invoked in the letter, it is accurately applied to this case. No invocation = neutral.

specific_requested_action.description: Clear overturn/reprocess ask, deadline-aware when possible.
